holdings.infoBox: FESM is an equity ETF with a total of 717 individual holdings. The top holdings are Fidelity Securities Lending Cash Central Fund stock at 4.04%, Bloom Energy at 2.14%, Fidelity Cash Central Fund at 1.56%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 1.42%, and Fabrinet at 1.06%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Enhanced Small Cap Core ETF (FESM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 index. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US, small-cap companies. Stock selection is based on computer-aided analysis, which chooses stocks belonging to the Russel 2000 Index. FESM was launched on Dec 20, 2007 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Fidelity® 'Enhances' ETF Lineup With Six New Active Equity Strategies and Reduced Pricing on Factor ETFs
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fidelity announced the launch of six new active equity ETFs and reduced pricing on factor ETFs.
